description_long: This is a large, elegant bungalow with a white exterior, featuring a prominent main building and an adjacent smaller structure, likely a garage or guest house. The property includes a spacious backyard with a rectangular swimming pool, surrounded by a dark deck and outdoor seating. The front yard is landscaped with green lawns, flower beds, and a row of trees lining the entrance path. The roof is dark gray and gabled, with multiple windows distributed across both floors, providing ample natural light. The main entrance is accentuated by a covered porch supported by columns. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, creating a luxurious residential environment.
description: A spacious white bungalow with a gabled roof, landscaped front yard, swimming pool, and a covered porch, combining traditional and modern design elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the landscaped entrance, flower beds, and the main porch with columns.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the property, the swimming pool, deck area, and the adjacent smaller building.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, deck, and the back of the main and secondary structures.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garden, trees, and the full length of the bungalow and its outbuilding.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side and rear windows
